form.name: advanced
form.label: copyparty exposes host files ( / + /opt/docker/volumes ) to admins. Do you want to change this behaviour?

form.name: mountPointRoot
form.label: What folder do you want to have available in copyparty? (Default: /)

form.name: mountPointVolumes
form.label: What folder do you want to have available in copyparty? (Default: /opt/docker/volumes)

form.name: adminOnly
form.label: Do you want to make this service admin only?

de.form.advanced.label: copyparty macht das Host-Dateisystem ( / + /opt/docker/volumes ) für Administratoren sichtbar. Möchten Sie dieses Verhalten ändern?
de.form.mountPointRoot.label: Welchen Ordner möchten Sie in copyparty zur Verfügung haben? (Standard: /)
de.form.mountPointVolumes.label: Welchen Ordner möchten Sie in copyparty zur Verfügung haben? (Standard: /opt/docker/volumes)
de.form.adminOnly.label: Möchten Sie diesen Dienst nur für Administratoren zugänglich machen?

fr.form.advanced.label: copyparty rend les fichiers de l'hôte ( / + /opt/docker/volumes ) accessibles aux administrateurs. Souhaitez-vous modifier ce comportement ?
fr.form.mountPointRoot.label: Quel dossier souhaitez-vous rendre accessible dans copyparty ? (Par défaut : /)
fr.form.mountPointVolumes.label: Quel dossier souhaitez-vous rendre accessible dans copyparty ? (Par défaut : /opt/docker/volumes)
fr.form.adminOnly.label: Souhaitez-vous rendre ce service accessible uniquement aux administrateurs ?

it.form.advanced.label: copyparty rende visibili agli amministratori i file dell'host ( / + /opt/docker/volumes ). Vuoi modificare questo comportamento?
it.form.mountPointRoot.label: Quale cartella desideri rendere disponibile in copyparty? (Impostazione predefinita: /)
it.form.mountPointVolumes.label: Quale cartella desideri rendere disponibile in copyparty? (Impostazione predefinita: /opt/docker/volumes)
it.form.adminOnly.label: Desideri rendere questo servizio accessibile solo agli amministratori?
